title: The Government Rewrites the Story
description: On pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this part focuses on the rain returns to alabasta. With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Rain Returns to Alabasta sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, Narrator, King Cobra, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There is no fair nor unfair!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Damn it, even the marines are here...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I haven't got any time to waste...!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Just where do you think you are!?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: That's what I should be asking you.

summary: With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
